section: TIER 1 — Real, Free, Downloadable, Use Immediately
what_you_get: Public EU MRV emission-report register and annual ship emissions context; bulk CSV endpoint not fetched in this audit.
use_for: Real vessel IMOs and realistic annual fuel volumes. Supplier-independent baseline.
workbook_status: reference_only; not used as transactional source
verification_note: Fetched site returned public/register flow; do not claim live EMSA CSV integration unless separately downloaded.

section: TIER 1 — Real, Free, Downloadable, Use Immediately
what_you_get: Daily Singapore VLSFO / HSFO / MGO / Biofuel prices. Public HTML table.
use_for: VLSFO spot price for financial_impact_usd calculation. Scrape daily to keep live.
workbook_status: v3 uses latest fetched VLSFO 865.50 USD/MT; workbook 718 USD/MT is stale/not used
verification_note: Latest public table fetched 2026-05-21; see Fuel_Prices_Extended.csv.

section: TIER 1 — Real, Free, Downloadable, Use Immediately
source_or_item:
MPA Licensed Bunker Suppliers List
(PDF on MPA bunkering page)
what_you_get: Public MPA PDF list of licensed bunker suppliers; v3 uses it as positive-list registry evidence.
use_for: Replace fictional suppliers with real MPA-licensed names (huge credibility boost).
workbook_status: reference_only; simulated incident suppliers remain synthetic demo entities
verification_note: Do not attach simulated anomalies to real supplier names. Supplier licence IDs in transactions are synthetic demo IDs.

section: BARGE DATA SOURCE — Real Singapore-Registered Bunkering Tankers
source_or_item: Barge IMOs and MMSI numbers used in this dataset are real Singapore-registered bunkering tankers sourced from public MarineTraffic AIS records (May 2026). Barge names in the dataset are fictional (to avoid reputational association with real vessels in simulated fraud scenarios). Real IMOs enable live AIS lookup via aisstream.io for the Anomaly A14 proximity rule demo. See VESSELS_AIS sheet.
verification_note: Merged from MockDataset_1.xlsx; independently verified where a matching v3/real file exists.
